allow:
Bash(git -C "d:\Nithya\Travel Companion\TravelCompanion" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
test: Update budget filter tests to match new requirement

Updated budget filter tests to reflect the new requirement where null budgets are treated as ₹0.
- Modified all budget filter tests to use `trip.budget ?? 0.0` logic
- Added explicit test for null budget being treated as 0
- Added test for null budget passing when minBudget is 0
- Updated combined search and filter tests
- All 18 unit tests pass + 31 use case tests pass = 49 total tests ✅

This ensures the test suite matches the actual implementation in home_page.dart
where trips without budget specified are treated as having ₹0 budget.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "d:\Nithya\Travel Companion\TravelCompanion" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement Group Chats and Direct Messages feature

- Add complete group chat functionality within trips
- Support for both Group Chats (3+ members) and Direct Messages (1:1)
- Auto-detect chat type based on member selection
- Smart DM lookup - finds existing DM or creates new one
- Filter tabs: All, Direct Messages, Groups
- Visual distinction with icons and colors (blue for DMs, purple for Groups)
- Section headers separating DMs and Groups in list view
- FAB menu to choose between DM or Group chat
- Chat type indicator showing current mode
- Efficient database function for DM lookup (find_existing_dm)

New files:
- conversation_model.dart - Data models for conversations
- conversation_entity.dart - Domain entities
- conversation_repository.dart - Repository interface
- conversation_repository_impl.dart - Repository implementation
- conversation_remote_datasource.dart - Supabase data source
- create_conversation_usecase.dart - Use cases
- get_trip_conversations_usecase.dart - More use cases
- conversation_providers.dart - Riverpod state management
- conversation_list_page.dart - List view with filters
- create_conversation_page.dart - Create DM or Group
- group_chat_page.dart - Chat interface
- conversation_info_page.dart - Chat settings/members
- 20251202_group_chat.sql - Database migration

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
